title: Regolamenti dwar il-Perjodu tal-Għeluq tal-Uffiċċji tal-Awtorità għall-Ambjent u r-Riżorsi
title_en: Regolamenti dwar il-Perjodu tal-Għeluq tal-Uffiċċji tal-Awtorità għall-Ambjent u r-Riżorsi
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/549.113/mlt, expression eli/sl/549.113/20170502/mlt).

provisions.title: LEGAL NOTICE 111 of 2017
provisions.content:
The title of these regulations is the Period of Shutdown
of the Environment and Resources Authority Offices Regulations.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
(1)
The period of shutdown of the Environment
and Resources Authority Offices shall be from the 24th December of
one year till the 1st January of the next following year.

Period of
Shutdown.

(2) The period mentioned in sub-regulation (1) shall
suspend any time-frame prescribed by any regulation under the Act.
